preferences.name: ghosttilePath
preferences.title: GhostTile Binary Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the ghosttile CLI.

commands.name: managed-apps
commands.title: Managed Apps
commands.subtitle: GhostTile
commands.description: Show and control your managed GhostTile apps.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
